_meta.provenance: INFORMATIVE / vendor-derived. WCAG 2.x was authored for the web; these XCUIAccessibilityAuditType -> WCAG-SC mappings are this project's best-effort bridge (cf. W3C 'Mobile Accessibility'). NOT normative. Every returned audit issue is treated as a 'fail' finding; VoiceOver behaviour and everything the 7 audit types don't cover route to 'Needs Manual Review'.
_meta.note: Keys starting with '_' are ignored by the normalizer. Appium returns the type in each issue; the normalizer matches either the short name (e.g. 'contrast') or the full 'XCUIAccessibilityAuditTypeContrast'.
